name: Breakfast Cereal Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/8 cups Of your favorite cereal (e.g., Great Grains, Just Right, Fruit and Fibre, or Raisin bran)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine DEBBIE PUENTE and yeast.
3. Add bread flour, cereal of choice, salt, baking soda, and brown sugar to the bowl with yeast mixture.
4. Stir until all ingredients are well incorporated.
5. Gradually add butter and warm water, mixing with your hands until dough forms.
6. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for about 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
7. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased bread pan.
8. Cover the pan with plastic wrap and let rise at room temperature for about an hour, or until doubled in size.
9. Bake in preheated oven for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing and serving.
